productDisplayName: Nike Men Sweet Classic Leather Navy Blue Casual Shoes
description: If you're looking for a way to enhance your sneaker-wear to a more classic, old-school appeal, kicks from the nike Sweet Classic Leather are a great way to make a start!UpperCrinkled-leather upper for style and comfortPadded collar and tongue for enhanced comfort and a snug Fitnike wwoosh on both sides of the midfootUpper stitched to the outsole for enhanced durabilityBrand name embroidered and appliqued on the collar and heel guard MidsoleBreathable fabric lining and a cushioned footbed for all-day comfort.EVA midsole combined to offer support and ample cushioningOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
